creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 190734
update sysutils/vagrant to 2.0.2

attached patch updates sysutils/vagrant to 2.0.2.
Updated dependencies in Makefile according to gemspec, removed patch-plugins_communicators_ssh_communicator.rb (obsoleted by upstream change, https://github.com/hashicorp/vagrant/pull/9341).

Note important changes:
https://github.com/hashicorp/vagrant/pull/9354
https://github.com/hashicorp/vagrant/pull/9389

Patch tested in ppoudriere - and it looks like vagrant is still working.

Note dependency on bug #225987
